Now try this similar problem on your own without any hints. Show your reasoning step by step:

Bob is tilling a plot of his garden. The plot is 161.5 feet wide by 146.1 feet long. His tiller digs a swath two feet wide, and he can till 1.4 foot of ground in about 2.6 seconds. How long will it take him to till this plot of land, in minutes?
